---
title: "2.upregulation_across_events"
author: "Griffin Kramer"
date: "2026-02-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(UpSetR)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}
logfc_tbl <- read_csv("results/LOGFC_TABLE.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)


RHAMNOSE_KEEP <- "NoRha"
STRAINS_KEEP <- c("0286", "2209", "2630", "4895")
LFC_CUTOFF <- 0.5

sigma_df <- logfc_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    strain   = as.character(strain),
    rhamnose = as.character(rhamnose),
    GeneID   = as.character(GeneID),
    log2FC   = as.numeric(log2FC),

    is_sigma54_controlled = is_sigma54_ebp | is_sigma54_predicted | is_sigma54_validated,

    Info = case_when(
      is_sigma54_ebp ~ "EBP",
      (is_sigma54_predicted | is_sigma54_validated) ~ "Sigma54 target",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),

    direction = case_when(
      LFC_CUTOFF == 0 & log2FC > 0 ~ "Up",
      LFC_CUTOFF == 0 & log2FC < 0 ~ "Down",
      LFC_CUTOFF >  0 & log2FC >=  LFC_CUTOFF ~ "Up",
      LFC_CUTOFF >  0 & log2FC <= -LFC_CUTOFF ~ "Down",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    strain %in% STRAINS_KEEP,
    rhamnose == RHAMNOSE_KEEP,
    is_sigma54_controlled,
    !is.na(direction)
  ) %>%
  select(GeneID, strain, log2FC, direction, Info) %>%
  mutate(strain = if_else(strain == "286", "0286", strain))  


merged <- sigma_df %>%
  group_by(GeneID, direction) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_log2FC    = mean(log2FC, na.rm = TRUE),
    count_strains = n_distinct(strain),

    Info = case_when(
      any(Info == "EBP") ~ "EBP",
      any(Info == "Sigma54 target") ~ "Sigma54 target",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),

    strains = paste(sort(unique(strain)), collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(count_strains), desc(abs(avg_log2FC)))

write_csv(
  merged,
  paste0("merged_sigma54_effectsize_4strains_", RHAMNOSE_KEEP, "_LFC", LFC_CUTOFF, ".csv")
)

```

```{r}

recurrence_plot_df <- merged %>%
  filter(direction == "Up",
         Info %in% c("EBP", "Sigma54 target")) %>%
  count(count_strains) %>%
  complete(count_strains = 1:4, fill = list(n = 0))

recurrence_plot <- ggplot(recurrence_plot_df,
                          aes(x = factor(count_strains), y = n)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    x = "# of strains gene is Up in",
    y = "# of sigma 54-controlled genes",
    title = "Recurrence of σ54-controlled gene upregulation across evolved strains"
  )

ggsave("results/recurrence_plot.pdf", recurrence_plot, width = 12, height = 10)
recurrence_plot

```

```{r}


up_genes_by_strain <- sigma_df %>%
  filter(direction == "Up") %>%
  distinct(GeneID, strain)

up_mat <- up_genes_by_strain %>%
  mutate(present = 1L) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = present, values_fill = 0L)


for (s in STRAINS_KEEP) {
  if (!s %in% names(up_mat)) up_mat[[s]] <- 0L
}


up_df <- as.data.frame(up_mat)
up_df[STRAINS_KEEP] <- lapply(up_df[STRAINS_KEEP], function(x) as.integer(x))

png("results/upset_sigma54_controlled_up_NoRha.png", width = 9, height = 5, units = "in", res = 300)
UpSetR::upset(
  up_df,
  sets = STRAINS_KEEP,
  order.by = "freq",
  mainbar.y.label = "Intersection size",
  sets.x.label = "Upregulated genes per strain"
)
dev.off()

```

```{r}
logfc_tbl <- read_csv("results/LOGFC_TABLE.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

RHAMNOSE_KEEP <- "Rha"

STRAINS_KEEP <- c("0286", "2209", "2630", "4895")


LFC_CUTOFF <- 0.5

sigma_df <- logfc_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    strain   = as.character(strain),
    rhamnose = as.character(rhamnose),
    GeneID   = as.character(GeneID),
    log2FC   = as.numeric(log2FC),

    is_sigma54_controlled = is_sigma54_ebp | is_sigma54_predicted | is_sigma54_validated,

    Info = case_when(
      is_sigma54_ebp ~ "EBP",
      (is_sigma54_predicted | is_sigma54_validated) ~ "Sigma54 target",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),

    direction = case_when(
      LFC_CUTOFF == 0 & log2FC > 0 ~ "Up",
      LFC_CUTOFF == 0 & log2FC < 0 ~ "Down",
      LFC_CUTOFF >  0 & log2FC >=  LFC_CUTOFF ~ "Up",
      LFC_CUTOFF >  0 & log2FC <= -LFC_CUTOFF ~ "Down",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    strain %in% STRAINS_KEEP,
    rhamnose == RHAMNOSE_KEEP,
    is_sigma54_controlled,
    !is.na(direction)
  ) %>%
  select(GeneID, strain, log2FC, direction, Info) %>%
  mutate(strain = if_else(strain == "286", "0286", strain))  # just in case


up_genes_by_strain <- sigma_df %>%
  filter(direction == "Up") %>%
  distinct(GeneID, strain)

up_mat <- up_genes_by_strain %>%
  mutate(present = 1L) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = present, values_fill = 0L)

for (s in STRAINS_KEEP) {
  if (!s %in% names(up_mat)) up_mat[[s]] <- 0L
}

up_df <- as.data.frame(up_mat)
up_df[STRAINS_KEEP] <- lapply(up_df[STRAINS_KEEP], function(x) as.integer(x))

png("results/upset_sigma54_controlled_up_Rha.png", width = 9, height = 5, units = "in", res = 300)
UpSetR::upset(
  up_df,
  sets = STRAINS_KEEP,
  order.by = "freq",
  mainbar.y.label = "Intersection size",
  sets.x.label = "Upregulated genes per strain"
)
```



```{r}

RHAMNOSE_KEEP <- "Rha"

df_all_for_cor <- logfc_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    strain   = as.character(strain),
    rhamnose = as.character(rhamnose),
    GeneID   = as.character(GeneID),
    log2FC   = as.numeric(log2FC),
    is_sigma54_controlled = is_sigma54_ebp | is_sigma54_predicted | is_sigma54_validated
  ) %>%
  filter(
    strain %in% STRAINS_KEEP,
    rhamnose == RHAMNOSE_KEEP,
    is_sigma54_controlled
  ) %>%
  select(GeneID, strain, log2FC)

fc_wide <- df_all_for_cor %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = log2FC)

plot_pair <- function(wide_df, s1, s2) {
  dat <- wide_df %>%
    select(all_of(c(s1, s2))) %>%
    drop_na()

  ct <- cor.test(dat[[s1]], dat[[s2]], method = "spearman")

  ggplot(dat, aes(x = .data[[s1]], y = .data[[s2]])) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.25) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(s1, " vs ", s2),
      subtitle = paste0("Spearman ρ = ", round(unname(ct$estimate), 2),
                        ", p = ", signif(ct$p.value, 2)),
      x = paste0("log2FC ", s1),
      y = paste0("log2FC ", s2)
    )
}

pairs <- combn(STRAINS_KEEP, 2, simplify = FALSE)
pair_plots <- lapply(pairs, function(p) plot_pair(fc_wide, p[1], p[2]))

corr_grid <- wrap_plots(pair_plots, ncol = 3) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = paste0("Pairwise log2FC correlations (σ54-controlled genes, ", RHAMNOSE_KEEP, ")")
  )

ggsave("results/log2fc_pairwise_correlations_sigma54_controlled_Rha.png",
       corr_grid, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 300)

corr_grid

```

```{r}

RHAMNOSE_KEEP <- "NoRha"

df_all_for_cor <- logfc_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    strain   = as.character(strain),
    rhamnose = as.character(rhamnose),
    GeneID   = as.character(GeneID),
    log2FC   = as.numeric(log2FC),
    is_sigma54_controlled = is_sigma54_ebp | is_sigma54_predicted | is_sigma54_validated
  ) %>%
  filter(
    strain %in% STRAINS_KEEP,
    rhamnose == RHAMNOSE_KEEP,
    is_sigma54_controlled
  ) %>%
  select(GeneID, strain, log2FC)

fc_wide <- df_all_for_cor %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strain, values_from = log2FC)

plot_pair <- function(wide_df, s1, s2) {
  dat <- wide_df %>%
    select(all_of(c(s1, s2))) %>%
    drop_na()

  ct <- cor.test(dat[[s1]], dat[[s2]], method = "spearman")

  ggplot(dat, aes(x = .data[[s1]], y = .data[[s2]])) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.25) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(s1, " vs ", s2),
      subtitle = paste0("Spearman ρ = ", round(unname(ct$estimate), 2),
                        ", p = ", signif(ct$p.value, 2)),
      x = paste0("log2FC ", s1),
      y = paste0("log2FC ", s2)
    )
}

pairs <- combn(STRAINS_KEEP, 2, simplify = FALSE)
pair_plots <- lapply(pairs, function(p) plot_pair(fc_wide, p[1], p[2]))

corr_grid <- wrap_plots(pair_plots, ncol = 3) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = paste0("Pairwise log2FC correlations (σ54-controlled genes, ", RHAMNOSE_KEEP, ")")
  )

ggsave("results/log2fc_pairwise_correlations_sigma54_controlled_NoRha.png",
       corr_grid, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 300)

corr_grid
```

```{r}


STRAINS_KEEP_2 <- c("4895", "2209")
RHAMNOSE_KEEP_2 <- c("Rha", "NoRha")
LFC_CUTOFF <- 0.5  

sigma_up_4895_2209 <- logfc_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    strain   = as.character(strain),
    rhamnose = as.character(rhamnose),
    GeneID   = as.character(GeneID),
    log2FC   = as.numeric(log2FC),

    strain = if_else(strain == "286", "0286", strain),

    is_sigma54_controlled = is_sigma54_ebp | is_sigma54_predicted | is_sigma54_validated,

    direction = case_when(
      LFC_CUTOFF == 0 & log2FC > 0 ~ "Up",
      LFC_CUTOFF == 0 & log2FC < 0 ~ "Down",
      LFC_CUTOFF >  0 & log2FC >=  LFC_CUTOFF ~ "Up",
      LFC_CUTOFF >  0 & log2FC <= -LFC_CUTOFF ~ "Down",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    strain %in% STRAINS_KEEP_2,
    rhamnose %in% RHAMNOSE_KEEP_2,
    is_sigma54_controlled,
    direction == "Up"
  ) %>%
  distinct(GeneID, strain, rhamnose) %>%
  mutate(set = paste(strain, rhamnose, sep = "_"))

gene_sets <- sigma_up_4895_2209 %>%
  group_by(set) %>%
  summarise(genes = list(unique(GeneID)), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tibble::deframe()

SETS_4 <- c("4895_Rha", "4895_NoRha", "2209_Rha", "2209_NoRha")
for (s in SETS_4) if (!s %in% names(gene_sets)) gene_sets[[s]] <- character(0)

up_mat_4 <- UpSetR::fromList(gene_sets)

png("results/upset_sigma54_up_4895_2209_Rha_vs_NoRha.png", width = 10, height = 5, units = "in", res = 300)
UpSetR::upset(
  up_mat_4,
  sets = SETS_4,
  order.by = "freq",
  mainbar.y.label = "Intersection size",
  sets.x.label = "Upregulated genes (σ54-controlled)"
)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
fisher_overlap <- function(setA, setB, background = 6000){

  overlap <- length(intersect(setA, setB))
  onlyA <- length(setdiff(setA, setB))
  onlyB <- length(setdiff(setB, setA))
  neither <- background - overlap - onlyA - onlyB

  mat <- matrix(
    c(overlap, onlyA,
      onlyB, neither),
    nrow = 2
  )

  fisher.test(mat)
}

genes_4895_Rha   <- gene_sets[["4895_Rha"]]
genes_4895_NoRha <- gene_sets[["4895_NoRha"]]

genes_2209_Rha   <- gene_sets[["2209_Rha"]]
genes_2209_NoRha <- gene_sets[["2209_NoRha"]]

fisher_overlap(genes_4895_Rha, genes_4895_NoRha)
fisher_overlap(genes_2209_Rha, genes_2209_NoRha)
```

```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(UpSetR)

STRAINS_INDUCIBLE <- c("0286", "2630")
RHAS <- c("Rha", "NoRha")
LFC_CUTOFF <- 0.5 


sigma_up_0286_2630 <- logfc_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    strain   = as.character(strain),
    rhamnose = as.character(rhamnose),
    GeneID   = as.character(GeneID),
    log2FC   = as.numeric(log2FC),
    strain   = if_else(strain == "286", "0286", strain),

    is_sigma54_controlled = is_sigma54_ebp | is_sigma54_predicted | is_sigma54_validated,

    direction = case_when(
      LFC_CUTOFF == 0 & log2FC > 0 ~ "Up",
      LFC_CUTOFF == 0 & log2FC < 0 ~ "Down",
      LFC_CUTOFF >  0 & log2FC >=  LFC_CUTOFF ~ "Up",
      LFC_CUTOFF >  0 & log2FC <= -LFC_CUTOFF ~ "Down",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    strain %in% STRAINS_INDUCIBLE,
    rhamnose %in% RHAS,
    is_sigma54_controlled,
    direction == "Up"
  ) %>%
  distinct(strain, rhamnose, GeneID)


rha_only_sets <- sigma_up_0286_2630 %>%
  group_by(strain) %>%
  summarise(
    genes_rha   = list(unique(GeneID[rhamnose == "Rha"])),
    genes_norha = list(unique(GeneID[rhamnose == "NoRha"])),
    genes_rha_only = list(setdiff(genes_rha[[1]], genes_norha[[1]])),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    set = paste0(strain, "_RhaOnly"),
    genes = genes_rha_only
  ) %>%
  deframe()

SETS_2 <- c("0286_RhaOnly", "2630_RhaOnly")
for (s in SETS_2) if (!s %in% names(rha_only_sets)) rha_only_sets[[s]] <- character(0)

up_mat_ind <- UpSetR::fromList(rha_only_sets)

png("results/upset_sigma54_up_RhaOnly_0286_2630.png", width = 8, height = 4.5, units = "in", res = 300)
UpSetR::upset(
  up_mat_ind,
  sets = SETS_2,
  order.by = "freq",
  mainbar.y.label = "Intersection size",
  sets.x.label = "Rha-only Up genes (σ54-controlled)"
)
dev.off()



fisher_overlap <- function(setA, setB, background_universe){
  U <- unique(background_universe)
  overlap <- length(intersect(setA, setB))
  onlyA   <- length(setdiff(setA, setB))
  onlyB   <- length(setdiff(setB, setA))
  neither <- length(U) - overlap - onlyA - onlyB

  mat <- matrix(c(overlap, onlyA, onlyB, neither), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
  fisher.test(mat)
}

genes_0286_rhaonly <- rha_only_sets[["0286_RhaOnly"]]
genes_2630_rhaonly <- rha_only_sets[["2630_RhaOnly"]]

background_genes <- logfc_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    strain   = as.character(strain),
    rhamnose = as.character(rhamnose),
    GeneID   = as.character(GeneID),
    strain   = if_else(strain == "286", "0286", strain),
    is_sigma54_controlled = is_sigma54_ebp | is_sigma54_predicted | is_sigma54_validated
  ) %>%
  filter(strain %in% STRAINS_INDUCIBLE, rhamnose %in% RHAS, is_sigma54_controlled) %>%
  distinct(GeneID) %>%
  pull(GeneID)

fisher_overlap(genes_0286_rhaonly, genes_2630_rhaonly, background_genes)
```
